title: Judge-human correlation harness (retest N=10)
hypothesis: LLM judges (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet) achieve Spearman correlation >= 0.7 with human quality judgments across rubric dimensions when the human proxy has meaningful variance.
control: Human ground-truth proxy (Claude Sonnet as senior UX researcher) with forced variance
variant: GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet LLMJudge backends
result: N=10. Best judge-human Spearman=0.297 (gpt=0.297, claude=0.200), cross-judge=0.152
